scripts.render: pnpm audio && remotion render src/index.ts PromoLandscape output/diffdash-v0.2.1-landscape.mp4 --public-dir=public --codec=h264 --crf=18 && node scripts/mux-compatible-audio.mjs output/diffdash-v0.2.1-landscape.mp4
scripts.render:vertical: pnpm audio && remotion render src/index.ts PromoVertical output/diffdash-v0.2.1-vertical.mp4 --public-dir=public --codec=h264 --crf=18 && node scripts/mux-compatible-audio.mjs output/diffdash-v0.2.1-vertical.mp4
scripts.render:all: pnpm render && pnpm render:vertical && pnpm verify
